title: Comforts Modernized
description: Redone textures for the Comforts mod to make them look faithful to modern Minecraft
body:
# Comforts Modernized

The Comforts Mod is a very good mod that makes a simple addition fitting for vanilla Minecraft.

However, it's textures look fitting specifically for older versions of the game. It's about time they get an update.

That's where I come in.



This resource pack aims to make the textures of the Comforts Mod for fitting for modern versions of Minecraft.

Currently, it changes the textures of the Sleeping Bag, Hammock, and Rope + Pin (I'm assuming that's the name of the item in-game. I forgot lol), so basically everything the mod offers.

Example pictures of textures in action can be found in the gallery tab.
